channel.title: Krea AI
channel.description: Krea AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Krea 2 Large shines in style fidelity
item.description: Contra Labs found Krea 2 Large within 0.14 points of GPT Image 2 on Style Fidelity in a four-model style-transfer benchmark.

item.title: Mood boards in Krea 2
item.description: Mood boards are one of the new tools in Krea 2 — more than four references, deeper style + concept capture, and presets for fast exploration.

item.title: Style references in Krea 2
item.description: How S-Refs work in Krea 2 — extracting style from a single image and applying it to any new prompt, with control over strength.

item.title: Exploratory prompting in Krea 2
item.description: Krea 2 rewards curiosity — start vague, see what comes back, and follow the threads you like.
